---
species: "Centropristis striata"
accepted_code: "CEST"
alternate_codes: ""
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Black sea bass"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Black or dusky brown with pale spots and bands along body and fins"
image: '/header_images/blackseabass.jpeg'
image_credit: 'Photo by Robertson D. & Van Tassell J. via [Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute](https://biogeodb.stri.si.edu/caribbean/en/thefishes/species/3480)'
categories:
  - fish
sampling_programs:
    - keen_fish
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_videos
habitat:
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "159348"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
